footer.tagline: The most affordable and easiest way to search and post jobs in Mizoram.

home.hero_subtitle: Find the latest jobs easily. Search listings across different districts of Mizoram.
home.search_placeholder: Search by job title, location, or company...

about.title: About Hnaruak Mizoram
about.description: Hnaruak Mizoram is a platform built to consolidate all job vacancies in Mizoram in one easy-to-search place. By solving the challenges faced in job discovery, we aim to bridge the gap between job seekers and employers, with support for the Mizo language.
about.mission_desc: To connect job seekers and employers seamlessly. Employers can post vacancies affordably, and job seekers can search for free without registration.
about.why_us_1: English & Mizo Support: Easy to navigate in your preferred language.
about.why_us_2: Self-Serve Payment: Post jobs in minutes via Razorpay integration.
about.why_us_3: Simple & Direct: Search for jobs directly without creating an account.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions or issues, feel free to reach out using the contact information below.
contact.success_msg: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your information and data.
privacy.section_1_desc: We collect username, email, phone number, company profile, and company logo for registered employers. We do not collect job seekers' personal data.
privacy.section_2_desc: Your information is used solely for job listing display and communication purposes. We do not sell data to third parties.
privacy.section_3_desc: When an employer deletes their account (soft-delete), all their job listings are hidden, but database records are retained for transaction history.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Important guidelines before using Hnaruak Mizoram.
terms.section_1_desc: All job postings must be genuine and reliable. Fake or fraudulent listings will be deleted immediately by the administrator.
terms.section_2_desc: Job posting fees are ₹299 for 15 days and ₹499 for 30 days. Listings go live immediately after successful payment confirmation.
terms.section_3_desc: Administrators reserve the right to suspend accounts or delete postings that violate our terms of service.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: Details on payment refunds.
refund.section_1_desc: Once a job listing goes live, payments are non-refundable.
refund.section_2_desc: Payments are processed securely via Razorpay. Listings will not go live without successful payment confirmation.
refund.section_3_desc: If you experience technical issues where a payment was debited but the job did not go live, please contact us. We will resolve it within 24 hours.

jobs.no_jobs: No job vacancies found at the moment.
jobs.not_found: The job listing you are looking for was not found or has expired.

report.title: Report Employer
report.success_msg: Your report has been submitted. We will review it shortly.

dashboard.delete_account_warn: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All active listings will be deleted as well.
